rules: H1 up to text-5xl or text-6xl, tracking-tight.
Overlines/labels must be uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em].
Use generous spacing philosophy. Multiply standard spacing by 1.5x.
Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
For dense data tables (pricing tiers), use 'Control Room' grid: gap-4, strict alignment.
Grid children must be direct children. Override stretch behavior with align-items: start.

components.buttons: Flat, pure primary color, text-white. No heavy shadow. 4px rounded radius (rounded-sm or rounded-md).
components.cards: Cardless or max 8px border-radius (rounded-lg). Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. On hover: shadow-lg, -translate-y-1.
components.tables: Use Shadcn Table. No card wrap, use simple 1px border. Striped rows with surface_secondary for readability.
components.forms: Use Shadcn forms. Inputs should have bg-transparent, 1px solid border, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary.
components.badges: For order status, use soft background (10% opacity of status color) and bold text of status color. rounded-full.

rules: Never use placeholder URLs. Use provided images.
Hero image max overlay opacity: bg-black/40 or bg-white/40.

image_urls.description: Hospital bed / medical facility for landing page hero.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards. All interactive elements must include data-testid.

icons.style: Use uniform icon weights, preferably stroke-width of 1.5 or 2 based on visual hierarchy.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard dashboard structure with Sidebar navigation and top header.
Implement Role-Based UI: Buyers see Marketplace and Cart. Sellers see Product Management and Order Approvals.
Use Shadcn UI for standard components but override default rounded radii (use rounded-md) and spacing.
Make tier pricing tables dense but legible using pure HTML/Tailwind tables or Shadcn Table.
Incorporate earthy, organic palette (Sage Green, Terracotta, Bone White) into dashboard elements.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
Never use placeholder images, strictly use the provided image_urls for products.
